source_pr.title: test: fix gofail test race
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix data race.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

root_cause_explanation: A package-level flag used by a gofail failpoint was read/written concurrently, causing a DATA RACE. The fix makes the flag thread-safe by switching to atomic load/store and wrapping access behind helper functions.
fix_pattern: Make shared failpoint/test flags thread-safe (atomic load/store for package-level state).

evidence: evidence: test: fix gofail test race
